aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.
World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: senior college of the City University of New York, located in Brooklyn
description_wiki: Brooklyn College (BC) is a public university in Brooklyn in New York City, New York.
Associated American Artists (AAA) was an art gallery in New York City that was established in 1934 and ceased operation in 2000.
Edward Hopper (July 22, 1882 – May 15, 1967) was an American realist painter and printmaker.

Vincent Willem van Gogh  (Dutch: [ˈvɪnsɛnt ˈʋɪləɱ vɑŋ ˈɣɔx] ; 30 March 1853 – 29 July 1890) was a Dutch Post-Impressionist painter who is among the most famous and influential figures in the history of Western art.

description: dictator of Germany from 1933 to 1945, main instigator of World War II (1889–1945)
description_wiki: Adolf Hitler (20 April 1889 – 30 April 1945) was an Austrian-born  German politician who was the dictator of Germany during the Nazi era from 1933 until his suicide in 1945.

description: city in Switzerland, capital of the canton of Bern and de facto capital of Switzerland
description_wiki: Bern (Swiss Standard German: [bɛrn] ), or Berne (French: [bɛʁn] ), is the de facto capital of Switzerland, referred to as the "federal city".

aliases: Museum of the Brooklyn Institute of Arts and Sciences
description: art museum in Brooklyn, New York
description_wiki: The Brooklyn Museum is an art museum in the New York City borough of Brooklyn.

description: art museum in New York City, United States
description_wiki: The Metropolitan Museum of Art, colloquially referred to as the Met, is an encyclopedic art museum in New York City.
